Print method for panel_diagnostics objects

print.panel_diagnostics.Rd

Print method for panel_diagnostics objects

Usage

# S3 method for class 'panel_diagnostics'
print(x, ...)

Arguments

x

An object of class panel_diagnostics.

...

Ignored.
